textByHashes.84f6ef7af6398e5cd50fcb48242e2ab8a9643801: Ask it for five! It looks rich!
textByHashes.5f7d2a9e229af5bc2c3300003f52c51bbd2a5fca: No we will not! It is too precious!
textByHashes.6a7248b28ba37b922e31e8ceadd3c622d7cc8420: It is trying to trick us! Evil, nasty creature it is. Do not listen to it!
